reviews.comment:
Pequeña estacion pero muy predispuesta  a brindar un excelente servicio. Lugar limpio, los baños tambien,  primera vez que la visito y si me pongo algo quisquilloso solo hay para criticar las facturas que las sirven media frias. Despues todo excelente, ambiente climatizado, y no tan concurrida, lo que la hace acojedora al ser pequeña dentro.

(Translated by Google)
Small station but very willing to provide excellent service. Clean place, the restrooms too. It's my first time visiting, and if I'm being picky, the only thing I can criticize is the pastries, which are served a bit cold. Otherwise, everything is excellent: air-conditioned, and not too crowded, which makes it cozy because of its small size.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBOS03TXZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente la atención, los baño perfectos. Lástima los juego para chicos que estan en el parque, se encuentran en muy mal estado sin nada de mantenimiento y son muy peligrosos para los chicos

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent, and the restrooms were perfect. It's a shame about the children's play equipment in the park; it's in very poor condition, completely unmaintained, and very dangerous for children.

reviews.comment:
Es una estación chica, con excelente atención, tanto en la playa como en el bar.
El bar tiene precios normales y a los socios del ACA nos hacen descuento.

(Translated by Google)
It's a small resort with excellent service, both on the beach and in the bar.
The bar has normal prices, and ACA members get a discount.
